narrative.opinion: Market is in the Anxiety rung of the ladder — fear is still elevated (F&G 25) but price has stabilized near $64K. This is a chop zone where neither panic selling nor hopeful buying dominates. The Aug 2024 analog suggests a bottoming process is underway, but we lack the catalyst to climb into Disbelief. Until we see a decisive move above resistance or a flush below support, the regime is neutral with a cautious upward bias on any positive macro or flow surprise.
